category_sources: source_facts.description calls it an on-disk/memory hashtable based on CDB; GitHub README describes a string key/value database with JSON and arrays support.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sdb; GitHub README heading is SDB (string database).
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents compilation and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/radareorg/sdb, so repo was not redetermined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions hashtable and CDB; GitHub README topics include c, database, key-value, data-structures, and hashtable.
